zh.Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Langton於1363年出生在英國爾金德頓時，她的父親Ralph de Langton23歲，母親Joan Radcliffe24歲。她於1382年與Richard de Venables在英國爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1450年在她的家鄉享年87歲。

zh-hans.Walton-le-Dale, Lancashire, England: 英国英格兰藍卡爾沃爾頓勒-達爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Langton于1363年出生在英国爾金德頓时，她的父亲Ralph de Langton23岁，母亲Joan Radcliffe24岁。她于1382年与Richard de Venables在英国爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1450年在她的家乡享年87岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Langton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the many places called with Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, such as Langton Hall in Kirkby in Ashfield (Nottinghamshire), Langton Lodge in Hendon (Middlesex), Langton (Yorkshire), East and West Langton (Leicestershire), Langton by Horncastle, Langton by Spilsby, and Langton by Wragby (all in Lincolnshire), and Lanton (Northumb). Compare Lankton , Lanton , and Longton .

variants.name: Lankton
meanings: History: Thomas Lankton, born c. 1714 in Hartford County, CT, died 1783 in Litchfield County, CT, was a son of Joseph Langton.

variants.name: Longton
meanings: habitational name from Longton in Lancashire. The placename derives from Old English lang ‘long’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Langton was born in 1363, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, her father, Ralph de Langton, was 23 and her mother, Joan Radcliffe, was 24. She married Richard de Venables in 1382, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1450, in her hometown, at the age of 87.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Langton est née en 1363, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Langton, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Joan Radcliffe, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard de Venables en 1382, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1450, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 87 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Langton 1363 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph de Langton 23 und ihre Mutter Joan Radcliffe 24. Sie hat 1382 in Cheshire, England Richard de Venables geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1450 im Alter von 87 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Langton è nata il nel 1363 nel Kinderton, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Ralph de Langton, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Joan Radcliffe, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard de Venables nel 1382, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1450, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 87 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Langtonが1363年にイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Langtonは23歳，母Joan Radcliffeは24歳であった。1382年にイギリスチェシュアイアでRichard de Venablesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1450年に故郷で87歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Langton(이)가 1363년 영국 체실르 킨더턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph de Langton(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Radcliffe(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1382년 영국 체실르에서 Richard de Venables(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1450년 그녀의 고향에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Langton nasceu em 1363, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Langton, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Joan Radcliffe, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard de Venables em 1382, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1450, em sua cidade natal, com 87 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Langton родилась в 1363 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph de Langton было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Joan Radcliffe, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard de Venables в 1382 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1450 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 87 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Langton nació en 1363, en Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph de Langton, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Joan Radcliffe, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard de Venables en 1382, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1450, en su pueblo, a la edad de 87 años.
